id.description: GUID used to identify the Account.

accountToken.description: This account identifier is generated by the financial institute (FI). This must be unique for your financial institute.

accountNumber.description: String(40) when AccountType is BANK String(4) when AccountType is CREDITCARD The Account Number is used to match the feed to a Xero Bank Account. The API will create a new Xero Bank Account if a match to an existing Xero Bank Account is not found. Only the last 4 digits must be supplied for Credit Card numbers. Must be included if AccountId is not specified.

accountName.description: The Account Name will be used for the creation of a new Xero Bank Account if a matching Xero Bank Account is not found.

accountId.description: Xero identifier for a bank account in Xero. Must be included if AccountNumber is not specified.

accountType.description: High level bank account type - BANK CREDITCARD BANK encompasses all bank account types other than credit cards.

status.description: the current status of the feed connection
